name: Chocolate Mint Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chocolate and water in a deep, 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Heat uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 45 seconds or until the chocolate is melted. Stir to blend the chocolate and water.
3. Add sugar, corn syrup, and salt. Continue heating uncovered in the Microwave Oven for 9 minutes or until a candy thermometer reaches 240°F (if using). If a candy thermometer is not available, drop a small amount of the mixture into very cold water. The mixture should form a soft ball that flattens when removed from the water. Do not place the thermometer in the microwave oven.
4. Stir every minute. Gradually blend in cream and flavoring. Makes 2 cups
